description: National health data exchange platform enabling secure access to clinical data. Unified API provides access to patient records from labs, imaging centers, pharmacies, and health systems. Focus on interoperability and TEFCA compliance.
business_model: B2B - Data exchange platform to healthcare organizations
target_market: Health systems, payers, digital health companies, labs
competitive_advantage: National data network, TEFCA-qualified HIN, comprehensive clinical data access

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure play - demonstrates value of health data exchange platforms
